summary: Tested Manufactured Items Workflow - Serial Number Based Inventory & Dispatch. All 14 backend tests pass. Frontend correctly shows serial numbers for manufactured items in inventory and dispatch forms.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: Master SKU TEST-INV-001 (manufactured), serials INV-TEST-001 (dispatched) and INV-TEST-002 (in_stock)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manufactured items workflow is fully functional. Backend blocks ledger entries for manufactured items (must use production workflow). Inventory shows serial numbers for manufactured items. Dispatch form shows serial number selector when manufactured item with stock is selected.

POST /api/inventory/ledger.blocks_purchase_for_manufactured: PASSED - Returns 400 with message about production workflow

GET /api/inventory/stock.returns_serial_numbers_for_manufactured: PASSED - serial_numbers array populated for manufactured items
GET /api/inventory/stock.returns_empty_serials_for_traded: PASSED - serial_numbers is empty array for traded items

GET /api/finished-good-serials/available.returns_only_in_stock_serials: PASSED - Only returns serials with status='in_stock'

POST /api/dispatches.requires_serial_for_manufactured: PASSED - Returns 400 without serial_number for manufactured items

production_workflow.production_requests_exist: PASSED - Production requests found in system
production_workflow.finished_good_serials_created: PASSED - Serials created from production workflow

accountant_inventory.serial_numbers_column: PASSED - Column exists in stock table
accountant_inventory.manufactured_badge: PASSED - Shows 'Manufactured' badge for manufactured items
accountant_inventory.no_serials_indicator: PASSED - Shows 'No serials in stock' for manufactured items without stock

accountant_dispatch_form.sku_lookup: PASSED - Finds SKU and shows stock availability
accountant_dispatch_form.serial_number_selector: PASSED - Appears for manufactured items with stock
accountant_dispatch_form.stock_validation: PASSED - Shows warning when no stock available

add_stock_entry_dialog.item_type_selection: PASSED - Raw Material, Master SKU options
